'''Air bikes''' were small, compact [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bikes]] used by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Rebel survey team|survey teams]].<ref name="Further">''[[The Further Adventures: Planet of the Hoojibs]]''</ref> A team led by [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Princess Leia]] used the vehicles to explore [[Arbra/Legends|Arbra]] shortly before establishing a [[Haven Base|base]] on the planet.<ref name="MC55" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 55|''Star Wars'' (1977) 55]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 55}} {{1st}}
*''[[The Further Adventures: Planet of the Hoojibs]]'' {{1stID|air bike}}
